# Study Guide

## Prerequisites

- Linear algebra and calculus
- Deep learning fundamentals (CNNs, RNNs, transformers)
- Basic reinforcement learning concepts
- Python and PyTorch

## Reading Order

1. Start with the orientation document for context
2. Read search strategies to understand the algorithmic landscape
3. Study benchmarks to understand evaluation methodology
4. Review practical applications for real-world context

## Key Papers

- Zoph and Le (2017) — Neural Architecture Search with Reinforcement Learning
- Liu et al. (2019) — DARTS: Differentiable Architecture Search
- Tan and Le (2019) — EfficientNet: Rethinking Model Scaling for CNNs
